title: Curro George: Shaping tomorrow's leaders in the heart of the Garden Route
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Curro George is a primary...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - Curro George is a primary school situated in George Central, committed to providing the learners in our community with access to high-quality education.


> We offer independent schooling that supports each child's academic, social and emotional growth. Our holistic approach focuses on developing confident, respectful and globally minded learners.


With small classes, hands-on technology and enriching programmes such as chess and robotics and coding, we create a stimulating, supportive environment in which children thrive in every aspect of their development.

Our foundation phase lays the groundwork for Group 5 and Grade R learners, building essential skills in play-based learning, language, maths and life skills. As the learners move into the intermediate phase, teaching becomes more abstract, with project-based activities that promote research, critical thinking and creativity beyond the textbook.

At Curro George, we grow alongside our learners, embracing innovation, strengthening connections with families and supporting our teachers every step of the way. This shared journey keeps our approach fresh, relevant and full of possibility.

Curro George is built on strong values that help each learner grow into the best version of themselves. These values are rooted in four key pillars: child-friendliness, positive discipline, Christian values (ethics and morals) and creative thinking.

Starting on Saturday 10 January, we invite the George community to visit us from 09:00 to 11:00 every Saturday in January for 2026 enrolments.

The enrolment mornings offer families an insight through live programme demonstrations, learners' musical performances and opportunities to meet our executive head.

This holiday, give the gift of education!

Enrol online anytime, from anywhere, and set your child up for success in 2026.

Visit www.curro.co.za to get started.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
